chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.S-55 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Fresh Case 1.For orders on CMA 150/25 2.For orders on office objections 3.For orders on CMA 151/25 4.For hearing of main case 21-03-2025 None present for the petitioner. **** None present for the petitioner and no intimation is received so far. However, from perusal of petition, it reflects that this petition is filed against harassment and for protection, for which an efficacious and alternate remedy is available before the ex-Officio Justice of Peace, but the same has not been availed by the petitioner. Under such circumstances, this petition being not maintainable is hereby dismissed along with listed application(s). JUDGE Ahmad
